description: CompositionTwo tone shirt in lavender and pink, made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with double button cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest, a full buttoned placket and a curved hemFitindigo nation Edgy FitWash careHand wash or machine wash cold below 30 degrees using a mild detergentFlat dry in shadeDo not wring or bleachWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsThis impeccably designed shirt from indigo nation remains a timeless classic. Wear this with formal trousers and leather shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
